heading: Coonooer Bridge vs Cooriemungle — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Coonooer Bridge, Victoria and Cooriemungle, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Cooriemungle has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Coonooer Bridge (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Coonooer Bridge or Cooriemungle safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Coonooer Bridge has a flood risk score of 22/100, while Cooriemungle scores 50/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Coonooer Bridge scores 61/100 for bushfire risk. Cooriemungle scores 19/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Coonooer Bridge or Cooriemungle?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Cooriemungle has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.85% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
